drl:
rule "R0"
salience 5
when
    accumulate( T2(f3 != false, $s0_0 : f0); $a0_0 : average($s0_0) )
then
    insert(new T3(0, 11, "", false));
    insert(new T3(8, 100, "beta", false));
end
rule "R1"
salience($b1_0_0 - $b1_0_0)
when
    T3(f3 != true, $b1_0_0 : f0)
then
end
rule "R2"
salience 2
when
    $p2_0 : T0(f0 == false, $b2_0_0 : f0, $b2_0_1 : f1)
then
    insert(new T3(5, 100, "beta", $b2_0_1));
    insert(new T2(-2, $b2_0_0, false, $p2_0.isF0()));
end
rule "R3"
when
    T1(f2 != 11, f3 in (true), $b3_0_0 : f1, $b3_0_1 : f0)
then
    insert(new T3($b3_0_0, 7, "a", false));
end
rule "R4"
when
    T2(f1 == true)
then
    insert(new T3(100, -3, "a", true));
end
rule "R5"
no-loop
when
    $p5_0 : T1()
then
    insert(new T3($p5_0.getF1(), $p5_0.getF2(), "b", true));
    insert(new T3(-2, $p5_0.getF1(), "", false));
end
query Q0(boolean $qa0_0, boolean $qa0_1, boolean $qa0_2)
    ( $qp0_0 : T3(f3 == $qa0_0, f3 == $qa0_1, f3 != false) )
    or
    ( $qp0_1 : T0(f1 == $qa0_2, f1 == $qa0_2, f1 != true, f0 != true, $qb0_0 : f0, $qb0_1 : f0) and $qp0_2 : T3(f1 > 100, $qb0_2 : f0, $qb0_3 : f2) )
end

query Q1(long $qa1_0, boolean $qa1_1)
    $qp1_0 : T3(f1 == $qa1_0, f2 != "a")
    $qp1_1 : T1(f0 == $qa1_1)
end

rule QR0 salience 2
when
    T0(f1 == false, $qr0_b0 : f1)
    ?Q0(false, $qr0_b0, false;)
then
    insert(new QOut(1, 8, 2.5, "beta", $qr0_b0));
end

rule QR1
when
    T0(f1 == true)
    ?Q1($qr1_x0, false;)
    ?Q0(false, true, true;)
    T1(f1 == $qr1_x0)
then
    insert(new QOut(2, $qr1_x0, $qr1_x0, "b", true));
end
